title: Skill
description: Schema for a Skill resource in the Fleet Management system. Skills can contain sub-skills.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the skill.

description.description: Detailed description of what the skill does.

instructions.description: Instructions or prompt template that defines the skill behavior.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining expected inputs for this skill.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema defining expected outputs from this skill.

sub_skills.description: List of sub-skills that compose this skill.

dependencies.description: List of other skill IDs this skill depends on (kebab-case).

name.description: Human-readable display name for the sub-skill.

description.description: Description of what the sub-skill does.

instructions.description: Instructions or prompt template for the sub-skill.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining expected inputs for this sub-skill.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema defining expected outputs from this sub-skill.
